name: @kagura-agent/flowforge
description: Enforced workflow engine for AI agents

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/flowforge.js --external:better-sqlite3 --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
